# CWE-342 vulnerable — Predictable Exact Value from Previous Values
lang: go
file: CWE-342-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

var lastOTP uint64 = 918273

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) Updates(values interface{}) error { return nil }

func SendLoginOTP(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	lastOTP++
	code := lastOTP
	return db.Updates(map[string]interface{}{"email": c.Request.PostFormValue("email"), "otp": code})
}
